summary: Frontend-only validation completed for Library + Pages sidebar tabs redesign. All major features working: clean/simple tabs without overlap, tab switching reliable, library cards readable with icon-only drag handles, page creation flow works. Minor truncation issue noted for very long page names.

issues: Very long page names (50+ chars) may extend beyond intended bounds in sidebar - visually truncated but bounding box extends past sidebar width. Low priority cosmetic issue.

critical_code_review_comments: Console warning persists: 'Each child in a list should have a unique key prop' in SectionRenderer - recommend adding unique key prop to list items
BuilderSidebar.jsx: Clean tab implementation using Radix UI Tabs with data-[state=inactive]:hidden for proper content switching
SectionLibraryCard.jsx: Icon-only drag handle (GripVertical) with proper styling - clean and simple as requested
Page row truncation uses CSS truncate class - works visually but very long names may still exceed bounds
seed_data_creation: Created test page 'This Is A Very Long Page Name For Testing Overflow Behavior' - left in project for cleanup
context_for_next_testing_agent: Tested URL: https://quick-site-builder.stage-preview.emergentagent.com. Verified: (1) Sidebar tabs Sections/Pages switch without content overlap - using data-[state=inactive]:hidden, (2) Tab strip clean with rounded-[1.05rem] corners and dark bg rgba(6,11,23,0.85), (3) Active tab bg rgb(32,39,55) with white text - good contrast, (4) Library cards show icon-only drag handle (GripVertical), category badge, name, description, add button - all readable, (5) Pages list shows page number, name (truncated), slug, section count, delete button on hover, (6) Page creation via input + button works, (7) No regression in auth->dashboard->builder flow. Note: Test page with very long name created during testing.

details: Sections and Pages tabs switch correctly
No mixed/stacked tab content - inactive content properly hidden
Tab strip has clean rounded design with dark background
Active tab highlighted with lighter bg and white text
10 library section cards visible in Sections tab
Icon-only drag handle (GripVertical) visible and functional
Category badge with truncation working
Section name and description readable
Add section button clickable
3 existing pages displayed (Home, About, Contact)
Page rows show: number, name, slug, section count
Delete button appears on hover
Page names truncated with CSS truncate class
Active page highlighted with gradient border
New page input field works
Add new page button creates page
Success toast notification appears
New page appears in list and becomes active
Auth login works with provided credentials
Dashboard loads with project list
Builder opens from dashboard
Basic builder interactions work
